heroHeadline: Ukraine Strikes Ilsky Refinery and Tatarstan; 11 Killed in Russian Kharkiv Bombardment
heroSubtitle: Ukrainian drones extend campaign to 9 Russian regions in March; Russia-Ukraine POW exchange of 300; Trump-Zelenskyy report 90–95% agreement on peace framework while Russia presses Fortress Belt offensive
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
